question_html:
Write down the appropriate preposition for the following sentences:

(a) The boy wanders ____ in the street.

(b) I felt shame ____ his conduct.

(c) He is resolved ____ going away.

(d) The book is suitable ____ children.

(e) We are tired ____ waiting.
solution_html:
(a) about/around  (b) at/for  (c) upon/on  (d) for   (e) of

Marks Distribution:

For writing the prepositions; (0.5×5) = 2.5 marks.

question_html:
Complete the following sentences:

(a) Honesty is the best policy. So, we should ______.

(b) Climate change is one of the greatest threats to humanity. If we don’t act now, ______.

(c) Unemployment is increasing day by day. It is high time _______.

(d) My village life was full of peace and joy. I wish ______.

(e) Social media connects people across the world. But ______.
solution_html:
(a) always speak the truth and act sincerely

(b) we will face terrible consequences in the future

(c) the government created more job opportunities

(d) I could go back to those golden days/ I were there again.

(e) it often wastes a lot of our valuable time

Marks Distribution:

For completing the sentences correctly; (0.5×5)=2.5 marks.

[N.B: Any kind of sentence that is correct, will also get allocated marks.]

question_html: Write a paragraph on ‘Ethical Use of Social Media’.
solution_html:
Ethical Use of Social Media

Social media has become an integral part of modern life, connecting people across the world and providing platforms for communication, education, and entertainment. However, it also presents ethical challenges such as spreading false information, cyberbullying, invasion of privacy, and addiction. Ethical use of social media requires honesty, respect for others, and responsibility while sharing content. Users should verify information before posting, avoid harmful or offensive material, and maintain personal and professional boundaries online. Parents, teachers, and organizations also play an important role in guiding young people about safe and responsible usage. When used ethically, social media can promote awareness, learning, and social interaction. Therefore, understanding and practicing ethical principles is essential to ensure that social media benefits individuals and society.

Marks Distribution:

For writing the title “Ethical Use of Social Media”: 0.5 mark.

For explaining the importance and benefits of social media: 01 mark.

For mentioning ethical challenges such as false information, cyberbullying, privacy invasion, and addiction: 01 mark.

For suggesting responsible use including verification, respect, and boundaries: 1.5 marks.

For concluding with the overall importance of ethical use: 01 mark.

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the obtained marks.

* 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]
